name: Pecan & Red Onion Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the order given.
2. Select white bread and press "Start".
3. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature unless otherwise noted.
4. Mix on manual setting if not using a bread machine.
5. After second kneading, remove dough from the machine.
6. Divide into two equal portions and place in small loaf pans.
7. Cover and let rise to double, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
